title: Record product completion status against M0-M5
outputs: A milestone status document states what is done, partial, blocked, and next
Manual gates are separated from Codex-implementable engineering work
The document prevents treating M4/M5 as complete before relay and field validation are done
do_not_do: Do not claim public relay, account system, payment, or app-store distribution are complete
Do not create release tags without real-phone acceptance evidence
Do not modify product code in this docs-only task
Do not stage unrelated untracked files
